meta.name: Jezreel Aldave Pilapil
meta.tagline: IT Technical Support · Quality Assurance · BPO Operations · Software & Hardware Engineer

about.headline: 20+ Years of Technical Excellence
paragraphs: I am a Technical Support, Quality Assurance, and Data Operations professional with over 20 years of hands-on experience spanning corporate BPO environments — including Verizon, Comcast, and Amazon programs — as well as independent software and hardware consulting.

I have progressed through roles in frontline customer operations, helpdesk analysis, revenue assurance, and quality analysis, consistently delivering process improvements, compliance auditing, and technical solutions in high-volume, SLA-driven environments.

Beyond corporate work, I have been a self-employed freelance developer since 2003 — building Android utility apps, full-stack web projects, and providing component-level hardware repair services to academic and small-business clients.

items: PC / Laptop / Tablet / Smartphone diagnostics & repair

roles.title: Contact Center Representative – VRSS/VZE
bullets: Coordinated store schedules and checked in customers for appointments based on real-time Verizon retail store availability.
Drove customer lifetime value by cross-selling and promoting exclusive Vivint smart home solutions post-interaction.
Executed outbound campaign calls and scripted promotional voicemail messaging to drive foot traffic to Victra/Verizon partner retail locations.
Mitigated customer friction by resolving product promotion and service escalations, maintaining first-contact resolution targets.

roles.title: Helpdesk Analyst 2 (Reliever)
bullets: Administered POS operations and delivered technical process support to floor sales staff, resolving system incidents via ServiceNow.
Managed incident logs and technical support requests from internal retail operations using ServiceNow.
Identified system bottlenecks and proposed workflow optimizations that improved departmental processing speed.

roles.title: Contact Center Representative
bullets: Managed front-end appointment tracking and retail support queries, maintaining baseline SLAs for customer store routing.
Managed proactive escalations, ensuring store location and promotion accuracy to minimize in-store friction.

roles.title: Revenue Assurance – Associate Operations Analyst
bullets: Synthesized raw statistical data from system databases to monitor daily sales and month-to-date (MTD) revenue performance.
Generated and dispatched business-critical intraday and end-of-day performance summaries (R2B emails) to stakeholders to call out revenue variances and trends.

roles.title: Contact Center Representative
bullets: Handled core campaign support and early qualification pre-screening metrics for specialty customer offerings (e.g., EARGO).

roles.title: Client Support Specialist – CoSo Profile Management
bullets: Researched and resolved complex federal, state, and local agency tax notices (e.g., IRS) utilizing structured compliance checklists.
Audited bank runs for FSDD rejections, investigated USMM mystery debits, and processed financial invoice modifications and offset corrections.

roles.title: Account Associate – Comcast Central Xfinity
bullets: Provisioned and troubleshot Comcast Triple-Play services (Voice, Internet, Cable TV) using ITG, maintaining first-call resolution rates.
Enforced security and privacy compliance protocols including CPNI guidelines and fraud/abuse assurance procedures.

roles.title: Customer Service Associate & Quality Analyst
bullets: Managed quality evaluation, transaction monitoring, and compliance auditing for multiple Amazon Lines of Business (LOB), including Amazon.co.uk, Amazon.com, Amazon Email, Amazon Voice, and Kindle Tech.
Audited service delivery across emails, voice interactions, and customer satisfaction (CSAT) surveys to ensure compliance with strict Amazon SLAs.
Delivered structured coaching sessions and actionable feedback to frontline teams of agents, improving site quality scores and customer experience metrics.
Recognized as a top-performing agent for the Amazon US Email program prior to moving into the Quality Analyst role.

roles.title: Technical Support Representative (L1)
bullets: Handled account maintenance, billing reversals, RF/speed troubleshooting, and home router configurations (Linksys, Netgear, D-Link).

roles.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Reviewed and corrected OCR-captured documents for accuracy, then migrated validated text data to XML elements.

projects.name: Siret.apk
projects.description: A local voicemail and device-recovery Android app featuring code-activated loudspeaker triggers and volume controls, built to bypass regional telco limitations.

projects.name: BK Mine.apk
projects.description: A queueing and ordering application built for local food sellers to streamline buyer claim processes and reduce manual queue management overhead.

projects.name: Tinustang Hangin.apk
projects.description: A lightweight personal expense logging application for custom budget tracking with category-based breakdowns and running totals.

projects.name: ServiceNow Helpdesk Operations
projects.description: As Helpdesk Analyst 2 at Mind Dragon Philippines, managed incident queues and technical support workflows for retail staff across multiple Verizon store locations, identifying bottlenecks and proposing workflow fixes that measurably improved processing speed.

projects.name: Revenue Assurance Reporting
projects.description: Built and maintained intraday and end-of-day R2B performance summary reports synthesized from raw database exports, enabling stakeholders to spot revenue variances and trends in real time.

projects.name: Full-Stack Freelance Projects
projects.description: Designed, built, and debugged full-stack web applications and custom tools for academic institutions and small-business clients since 2003 — covering front-end, back-end, and database layers.

awards.name: US Email Rockstar Award
awards.description: Awarded at the Agent Level for outstanding commitment, customer obsession, and achieving a 101.89% Offer Rate for the Amazon US Email line of business.

contact.cta: Available for remote VA, technical support, helpdesk, and freelance dev engagements. Let's connect.
